data.title: He Yi retweeted CZ's 2020 tweet that "BTC will plummet from $101,000 to $85,000" and remarked: Time flies.
data.description: Binance co-founder He Yi retweeted CZ's five-year-old tweet on the X platform, predicting that "BTC will drop from $101,000 to $85,000," with the caption "Time flies." The tweet, posted on October 17, 2020, reads: "Waiting for the next headline: BTC will plummet from $101,000 to $85,000. Save this tweet."

data.description:

data.title: ARK Invest wraps up week with Bitcoin ETF, Bullish, Circle, BitMine buys
data.description:
ARK Invest ramped up its crypto exposure on Friday, adding Bullish, BitMine, Circle, Robinhood and nearly $600K in Bitcoin ETFs as crypto equities attempted a rebound.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ark-invest-boosts-bullish-bitmine-circle-btc-etfs?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Japan’s Harsh Crypto Tax Rules Are Fueling a Boom in Bitcoin Treasury Firms
data.description:
Japan’s unusual tax landscape is creating an environment where Bitcoin-holding corporations routinely outperform Bitcoin itself, drawing investors toward “digital-asset treasury” (DAT) firms even as regulators consider tightening oversight.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/japans-harsh-crypto-tax-rules-are-fueling-a-boom-in-bitcoin-treasury-firms/

data.title: Crypto ETFs Experience Significant Outflows Amid Market Decline
data.description:
According to Odaily, The Kobeissi Letter reported on the X platform that crypto ETFs saw an outflow of $2 billion last week, marking the largest weekly outflow since February. This represents the third consecutive week of outflows, totaling $3.2 billion.

Bitcoin ETFs experienced an outflow of $1.4 billion, while Ethereum ETFs saw $689 million withdrawn. Over the past month, the average daily outflow as a percentage of total assets under management has reached a record high. Due to declining prices and these outflows, the total assets under management have decreased by 27% from their peak in October, now standing at $191 billion.

data.title: Data: This week, 23 projects raised a total of $1.41 billion, with Kalshi raising $1 billion at a valuation of $11 billion.
data.description: According to Messari monitoring, a total of 23 projects raised a total of $1.41 billion this week. The top five fundraising cases are: Kalshi, raising $1 billion with a valuation of $11 billion; Kraken, raising $200 million with a valuation of $20 billion; Doppel, raising $70 million with a valuation exceeding $600 million; Obex, raising $37 million, a crypto incubator focusing on yield-supported stablecoin projects based on the Sky ecosystem; and DeBlock, raising $34.7 million, a European on-chain banking platform.

data.title: Ethereum co-founder and Sharplink chairman: Sharplink's institutional holdings continue to increase, and delayed data disclosure can easily affect market confidence; tokenized stocks may bring about a change.
data.description: Regarding Sharplink CIO Matt Sheffield's point that "13F filings (disclosure of holdings by large asset management firms) are typically submitted within 45 days of the end of each quarter, leading to a lag in market adoption of the data," Joseph Lubin, co-founder of Ethereum, founder of Consensys, and chairman of Sharplink, expressed his agreement in an article on the X platform. He stated, "Recent filings show a clear trend: institutional holdings of @SharpLink stock continue to increase. Even as the stock and crypto markets are adjusting to the current macroeconomic environment, the holdings data still shows increasing institutional confidence. Delayed disclosures make this easily overlooked; another reason is that tokenized stocks will eventually provide clearer, real-time transparency."

data.title: Crypto ETFs saw $2 billion in outflows last week, marking the largest weekly outflow since February.
data.description: The Kobeissi Letter, a capital commentary media outlet, reported on the X platform that crypto ETFs saw $2 billion in outflows last week, the largest weekly outflow since February. This marks the third consecutive week of outflows, totaling $3.2 billion. Of this, Bitcoin ETFs saw $1.4 billion in outflows, and Ethereum ETFs saw $689 million. Over the past month, the average daily outflow as a percentage of total assets under management has risen to an all-time high. Affected by price declines and fund outflows, total assets under management have fallen 27% from their October peak to $191 billion.

data.title: U.S. Bill Proposes Allowing Federal Taxes to Be Paid in Bitcoin
data.description:
A new proposal introduced in the U. S. House in November 2025 would mark one of the most significant federal shifts toward Bitcoin integration to date. Representative Warren Davidson has unveiled the “Bitcoin for America Act,” a bill that would allow citizens to pay their federal taxes directly in Bitcoin, and channel those payments into the […] The post U
source: https://www.ethnews.com/u-s-bill-proposes-allowing-federal-taxes-to-be-paid-in-bitcoin/

data.title: Tether's USDT-related gold reserves have reached $12.9 billion, an increase of $7.6 billion in nine months.
data.description: According to Tether's Q3 2025 report, USDT's gold reserves jumped from $5.3 billion to $12.9 billion, an increase of $7.6 billion in just nine months (compared to the beginning of the year). (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Brazil Moves to Liquidate Seized Bitcoin Before Criminal Trials Begin
data.description:
Brazil’s President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva has introduced a sweeping new proposal that would give authorities the power to sell seized cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, before criminal trials are completed.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/brazil-moves-to-liquidate-seized-bitcoin-before-criminal-trials-begin/

data.title: Aerodrome: Centralized domains .finance and .box still pose security risks; please do not use them.
data.description: The Base ecosystem's DEX Aerodrome official website updated its progress on the X platform, stating that the centralized domains (.finance and .box) remain compromised. Users are advised to temporarily refrain from using either domain. The two decentralized mirror websites remain secure and available, and all smart contracts are safe. More information will be provided as the investigation unfolds. Previous reports indicated that the official Aerodrome domain may have been subject to DNS hijacking, prompting users to refrain from using it.

data.title: Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission: AmazingTech suspected of engaging in unlicensed activities; beware of being scammed.
data.description: According to an official announcement from the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission, the public is warned to be wary of a virtual asset trading platform called "AmazingTech," and it has been added to the list of suspicious virtual asset trading platforms. This platform claims to operate a virtual asset trading platform in Hong Kong and is suspected of engaging in unlicensed activities.

data.title: Analysis: The short-term rise in FLUID may be due to Wintertermute buying to repay loans, using only a 40% discount to repay loans for market making.
data.description: On-chain analyst @AmirOrmu posted on the X platform that FLUID's recent brief 50% surge may be due to Wintermute's buying activity. It's understood that Wintermute purchased $500,000 worth of FLUID tokens on-chain. Combined with factors such as the upcoming maturity date of a market maker loan, this means they are buying back tokens they sold earlier this year at a discount to repay their loans. (They received the FLUID tokens at $10 each; now they only need to buy them back at approximately $4). These market makers sell the tokens immediately after receiving them and then buy them back a year later at a significant discount to repay the loans, a profitable market maker strategy. Furthermore, he mentioned that Wintermute's loan amount is 700,000 FLUID. They currently hold approximately 370,000 FLUID on-chain tokens and at least 350,000 FLUID on the CEX, so they don't need to increase their FLUID holdings; they already have enough to repay the loan. The loan maturity date is around mid-December.

data.title: Significant Transfer of cbBTC from Wintermute to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 14:27, a total of 2,376.86 cbBTC, valued at approximately $200 million, was transferred from Wintermute to an anonymous address starting with 0xdb80.

data.title: Bitcoin’s Price Drop Mirrors Every Major Rally Since 2020: Here’s What Comes Next
data.description:
Bitcoin’s latest drawdown has rattled the market, but according to analyst Miles Deutscher, this correction fits the same pattern seen throughout the current cycle. His shared chart highlights a series of 30%+ retracements, all of which occurred during broader bullish momentum rather than signaling the end of it.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoins-price-drop-mirrors-every-major-rally-since-2020-heres-what-comes-next/

data.title: Binance Alpha's new airdrop will be available on Sparkle (SSS).
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance Alpha will launch Sparkle (SSS) for the first time on November 24th. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using their Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page after trading opens. More details will be announced soon.
